title: The Richest Man in Babylon
subtitle: The Success Secrets of the Ancients
author: George S. Clason
themes: Pay yourself first — save 10% of all you earn
Live below your means by controlling expenditures
Make money work for you through wise investment
Guard wealth against loss through caution and counsel
Own your home as a profitable investment
Secure future income through long-term planning
Invest in yourself to increase earning ability
excerpt: A part of all you earn is yours to keep. The Richest Man in Babylon dispenses timeless financial wisdom through parables set 4,000 years ago in ancient Babylon — the 7 Cures for a Lean Purse and the 5 Laws of Gold.
